---
title: "11_disease_trajectory"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r}
install_if_missing_cran <- function(pkg) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(
      pkg,
      lib = ("/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/R_SLL_Seurat/"),
      dependencies = TRUE
    )
  }
}

install_if_missing_bioc <- function(pkg) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    BiocManager::install(
      pkg,
      lib = ("/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/R_SLL_Seurat/"),
      update = FALSE,
      ask = FALSE
    )
  }
}




library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(harmony)
library(aws.s3)
library(jsonlite)
library(patchwork)
library(rstatix)
library(ggplot2)
#BiocManager::install("slingshot")
library(slingshot)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(uwot)
library(S4Vectors)
library(scales)

```

```{r}
#directores
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "leidholt") {
  root_path <- c("/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/") #hyak
  git_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/leidholt/keys.json")
} else if (user == "sleidholt") {
    root_path <- c("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/") #mac studio
    dir.results <- c("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Savanah Leidholt/") 
    git_path <- "/Users/sleidholt/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad/Savanah Leidholt"
} else if (user == "savanahleidholt") {
    root_path <- c("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/") #laptop
    dir.results <- c("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Savanah Leidholt/") 
    git_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/Desktop/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad/Savanah Leidholt"
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path for this user.")
}
```

```{r}
Sys.setenv(
  "AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" = keys$MY_ACCESS_KEY,
  "AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY" = keys$MY_SECRET_KEY,
  "AWS_DEFAULT_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_S3_ENDPOINT" = "s3.kopah.uw.edu"
)
```

```{r}
pb90_PT <- s3readRDS(
  object = "data/disease trajectory/pb90_multiomics_PT_20260529.rds",
  bucket = "triad",
  region = ""
)

pb90_TAL <- s3readRDS(
  object = "data/disease trajectory/pb90_multiomics_TAL_20260529.rds",
  bucket = "triad",
  region = ""
)

#pb90_EC_PTC <- s3readRDS(
#  object = "data/disease trajectory/pb90_multiomics_EC_PTC_20260529.rds",
#  bucket = "triad",
#  region = ""
#)

#pb90_EC_all <- s3readRDS(
#  object = "data/disease trajectory/pb90_multiomics_EC_all_20260529.rds",
#  bucket = "triad",
#  region = ""
#)
```

```{r fig.width=18}
p1 <-  DimPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "group"
)

p2 <-DimPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype"
)

p3 <- DimPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  split.by = "group",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype",
  ncol = 2
)

p1 | p2

p3 | p2
```

```{r fig.width=20, fig.height=10}
p4 <- FeaturePlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  features = c(
    "HAVCR1",
    "VCAM1",
    "LCN2",
    "KRT8",
    "KRT18",
    "VIM"
  )
)

p2 + p4

p3 | p4
```

```{r}
score_and_summarize <- function(obj, gene_set, score_name, group_var = "group") {
  
  genes_use <- intersect(gene_set, rownames(obj))
  
  message(score_name, ": using ", length(genes_use), " genes")
  print(genes_use)
  
  obj <- AddModuleScore(
    obj,
    features = list(genes_use),
    name = score_name
  )
  
  score_col <- paste0(score_name, "1")
  
  cell_df <- FetchData(
    obj,
    vars = c(score_col, group_var, "record_id", "KPMP_celltype")
  )
  
  donor_df <- cell_df %>%
    group_by(record_id, .data[[group_var]]) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_score = mean(.data[[score_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      median_score = median(.data[[score_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      n_cells = n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  list(
    obj = obj,
    cell_df = cell_df,
    donor_df = donor_df,
    score_col = score_col
  )
}
```

```{r}
#PT disease trajectory score
pt_injury_genes <- c(
  "HAVCR1", "VCAM1", "LCN2", "KRT8", "KRT18", "VIM", "SOX9"
)

pt_identity_genes <- c(
  "LRP2", "CUBN", "SLC5A2", "SLC34A1", "ALDOB", "AQP1"
)

pt_injury <- score_and_summarize(
  obj = pb90_PT,
  gene_set = pt_injury_genes,
  score_name = "PT_injury"
)

pb90_PT <- pt_injury$obj

pt_identity <- score_and_summarize(
  obj = pb90_PT,
  gene_set = pt_identity_genes,
  score_name = "PT_identity"
)

pb90_PT <- pt_identity$obj
VlnPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  features = c("PT_injury1", "PT_identity1"),
  group.by = "group",
  pt.size = 0
)

FeaturePlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  features = c("PT_injury1", "PT_identity1"),
  ncol = 2
)
```

```{r}
#Donor-level plot
pt_donor <- FetchData(
  pb90_PT,
  vars = c("PT_injury1", "PT_identity1", "group", "record_id")
) %>%
  group_by(record_id, group) %>%
  summarise(
    PT_injury = mean(PT_injury1, na.rm = TRUE),
    PT_identity = mean(PT_identity1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_cells = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(pt_donor, aes(x = group, y = PT_injury)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 2) +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(pt_donor, aes(x = PT_identity, y = PT_injury, label = record_id)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = n_cells)) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "PT identity score",
    y = "PT injury score"
  )
```

#--------- #tal cells #---------
```{r}
p5<- DimPlot(
  pb90_TAL,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "group"
)

p6 <-DimPlot(
  pb90_TAL,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype"
)

p7 <- DimPlot(
  pb90_TAL,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  split.by = "group",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype",
  ncol = 2
)
```

```{r fig.width=18}
p8 <- FeaturePlot(
  pb90_TAL,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  features = c(
    "UMOD",
    "SLC12A1",
    "KCNJ1",
    "CLDN16",
    "VCAM1",
    "KRT18"),
  ncol = 2
)

p5 | p8
p7 | p8
```

```{r}
pb90_TAL <- AddModuleScore(
  pb90_TAL,
  features = list(
    c("VCAM1", "KRT8", "UMOD", "CLDN16")
  ),
  name = "TAL_injury"
)
```

```{r}
VlnPlot(
  pb90_TAL,
  features = "TAL_injury1",
  group.by = "group"
)
```

```{r}
p9<- DimPlot(
  pb90_EC_PTC,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "group"
)

p10 <-DimPlot(
  pb90_EC_PTC,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype"
)

p11 <- DimPlot(
  pb90_EC_PTC,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  split.by = "group",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype",
  ncol = 2
)
p9
p10
p11
```

#-----------------
#PT specific umaps
#----------------
```{r}
pb90_PT2 <- FindVariableFeatures(pb90_PT)

pb90_PT2 <- ScaleData(pb90_PT2)

pb90_PT2 <- RunPCA(pb90_PT2)

pb90_PT2 <- RunHarmony(
  pb90_PT2,
  group.by.vars = "study"
)

pb90_PT2 <- FindNeighbors(
  pb90_PT2,
  reduction = "harmony",
  dims = 1:30
)

pb90_PT2 <- FindClusters(
  pb90_PT2,
  resolution = 0.6
)

pb90_PT2 <- RunUMAP(
  pb90_PT2,
  reduction = "harmony",
  dims = 1:30,
  reduction.name = "umap.TRIAD"
)
```

```{r}
DimPlot(
  pb90_PT2,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "seurat_clusters",
  label = TRUE
)

Dimplot(pb902)

DimPlot(
  pb90_PT2,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype",
)

DimPlot(
  pb90_PT2,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype",
  split.by = "group"
)

FeaturePlot(
  pb90_PT2,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  features = c("LRP2", "SLC5A2", "HAVCR1", "VCAM1")
)
```

#------------------------------
# Slingshot setup function
#adapted from attempt functions
#------------------------------
```{r}
slingshot_setup <- function(
    seurat_obj,
    celltype_prefix,
    cluster_col = "KPMP_celltype",
    assay = "RNA"
) {
  
  counts <- GetAssayData(
    seurat_obj,
    assay = assay,
    layer = "counts"
  )
  
  sce <- SingleCellExperiment(
    assays = List(counts = counts),
    colData = seurat_obj@meta.data
  )
  
  # gene filtering
  gene_filter <- Matrix::rowSums(assays(sce)$counts >= 3) >= 10
  sce <- sce[gene_filter, ]
  
  # quantile normalization from workflow
  FQnorm <- function(counts) {
    counts <- as.matrix(counts)
    rk <- apply(counts, 2, rank, ties.method = "min")
    counts.sort <- apply(counts, 2, sort)
    refdist <- apply(counts.sort, 1, median)
    norm <- apply(rk, 2, function(r) refdist[r])
    rownames(norm) <- rownames(counts)
    colnames(norm) <- colnames(counts)
    norm
  }
  
  assays(sce)$norm <- FQnorm(assays(sce)$counts)
  
  # PCA on normalized counts
  pca <- prcomp(
    t(log1p(assays(sce)$norm)),
    scale. = FALSE
  )
  
  var_explained <- pca$sdev^2 / sum(pca$sdev^2) * 100
  names(var_explained) <- paste0("PC", seq_along(var_explained))
  
  elbow_df <- data.frame(
    PC = 1:50,
    VarianceExplained = var_explained[1:50]
  )
  
  elbow_plot <- ggplot(elbow_df, aes(x = PC, y = VarianceExplained)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_line() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Elbow Plot:", celltype_prefix),
      x = "Principal Component",
      y = "% Variance Explained"
    ) +
    theme_bw()
  
  colData(sce)$cluster <- colData(sce)[[cluster_col]]
  
  return(list(
    sce = sce,
    pca = pca,
    var_explained = var_explained,
    elbow_plot = elbow_plot
  ))
}
```

#---------------------
# Run Slingshot on PCA
#---------------------
```{r}
run_slingshot <- function(
    sce,
    pca_obj,
    n_pcs = 6,
    start_cluster = NULL,
    end_cluster = NULL,
    cluster_label = "cluster"
) {
  
  rd1 <- pca_obj$x[, 1:n_pcs]
  colnames(rd1) <- paste0("PC", 1:n_pcs)
  
  umap_mat <- uwot::umap(
    t(log1p(assays(sce)$norm)),
    n_neighbors = 30,
    min_dist = 0.3
  )
  colnames(umap_mat) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")
  
  reducedDims(sce) <- SimpleList(
    PCA = rd1,
    UMAP = umap_mat
  )
  
  sce_sl <- slingshot(
    sce,
    clusterLabels = cluster_label,
    reducedDim = "PCA",
    start.clus = start_cluster,
    end.clus = end_cluster
  )
  
  return(sce_sl)
}
```

#-----------------------
# Plot Slingshot on PCA
#-----------------------
```{r}
plot_slingshot_trajectory <- function(
    sce_sl,
    var_explained,
    cluster_label = "cluster",
    title = NULL,
    lineage = 1
) {
  
  pca_df <- as.data.frame(reducedDims(sce_sl)$PCA)
  pca_df$cluster_label <- factor(colData(sce_sl)[[cluster_label]])
  pca_df$pseudotime <- slingPseudotime(sce_sl)[, lineage]
  
  curves <- slingCurves(sce_sl)
  curve_df <- as.data.frame(curves[[lineage]]$s)
  
  p <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = cluster_label)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8) +
    geom_path(
      data = curve_df,
      aes(x = PC1, y = PC2),
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 1.2,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      color = NULL,
      x = paste0("PC1 (", round(var_explained["PC1"], 1), "%)"),
      y = paste0("PC2 (", round(var_explained["PC2"], 1), "%)")
    ) +
    theme_classic()
  
  return(list(
    plot = p,
    pca_df = pca_df,
    curve_df = curve_df,
    curves = curves,
    lineages = slingLineages(sce_sl)
  ))
}
```

```{r}
pt_setup <- slingshot_setup(
  seurat_obj = pb90_PT2,
  celltype_prefix = "PT",
  cluster_col = "KPMP_celltype"
)

pt_setup$elbow_plot

sce_PT_sl <- run_slingshot(
  sce = pt_setup$sce,
  pca_obj = pt_setup$pca,
  n_pcs = 6,
  start_cluster = "PT-S1/S2",
  cluster_label = "cluster"
)

pt_plot <- plot_slingshot_trajectory(
  sce_sl = sce_PT_sl,
  var_explained = pt_setup$var_explained,
  title = "PT Slingshot trajectory"
)

pt_plot$plot

pb90_PT2$pseudotime <- slingPseudotime(sce_PT_sl)[, 1]
```
```{r}
FeaturePlot(pb90_PT2, features = "pseudotime", reduction = "umap.TRIAD")
VlnPlot(pb90_PT2, features = "pseudotime", group.by = "group", pt.size = 0)
```

```{r}
FeaturePlot(
  pb90_PT2,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  features = c(
    "pseudotime",
    "LRP2",
    "SLC5A2",
    "CUBN",
    "HAVCR1",
    "VCAM1"
  ),
  ncol = 3
)
```

```{r}
VlnPlot(
  pb90_PT2,
  features = "pseudotime",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype",
  pt.size = 0
)
```

```{r}
slingLineages(sce_PT_sl)
```
```{r}
pb90_PT2$PT_lineage1<- pt[, 1]
plot_df <- FetchData(
  pb90_PT2,
  vars = c("PT_lineage1", "group")
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(PT_lineage1))

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = group, y = PT_lineage1)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.12, outlier.shape = NA) +
  labs(
    x = "Group",
    y = "PT lineage 1 pseudotime",
    title = "PT lineage 1 pseudotime by group"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

kruskal.test(PT_lineage1 ~ group, data = plot_df)

pairwise.wilcox.test(
  plot_df$PT_lineage1,
  plot_df$group,
  p.adjust.method = "BH"
)

```


```{r}
pt_donor <- pb90_PT2@meta.data %>%
  filter(!is.na(pseudotime)) %>%
  group_by(record_id, group) %>%
  summarise(
    median_pt = median(pseudotime),
    pct_high_pt = mean(pseudotime > 40),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```


```{r}
ggplot(
  pt_donor,
  aes(group, median_pt, fill = group)
) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1)

ggplot(
  pt_donor,
  aes(group, pct_high_pt, fill = group)
) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1)
```

#------------------
#Tal specific umaps
#------------------
```{r}
pb90_TAL2 <- FindVariableFeatures(pb90_TAL)

pb90_TAL2 <- ScaleData(pb90_TAL2)

pb90_TAL2 <- RunPCA(pb90_TAL2)

pb90_TAL2 <- RunHarmony(
  pb90_TAL2,
  group.by.vars = "study"
)

pb90_TAL2 <- FindNeighbors(
  pb90_TAL2,
  reduction = "harmony",
  dims = 1:30
)

pb90_TAL2 <- FindClusters(
  pb90_TAL2,
  resolution = 0.6
)

pb90_TAL2 <- RunUMAP(
 pb90_TAL2,
  reduction = "harmony",
  dims = 1:30,
  reduction.name = "umap.TRIAD"
)
```

```{r}
DimPlot(
  pb90_TAL2,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "seurat_clusters",
  label = TRUE
)

DimPlot(
  pb90_TAL2,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype"
)

FeaturePlot(
 pb90_TAL2,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  features = c("SLC12A1", "UMOD", "CLDN16", "CLDN10", "KCNJ1")
)

FeaturePlot(
 pb90_TAL2,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  features = c("LCN2", "VCAM1", "KRT8", "KRT18", "VIM")
)
```

```{r}
tal_setup <- slingshot_setup(
  seurat_obj = pb90_TAL2,
  celltype_prefix = "TAL",
  cluster_col = "KPMP_celltype"
)

tal_setup$elbow_plot

sce_tal_sl <- run_slingshot(
  sce = tal_setup$sce,
  pca_obj = tal_setup$pca,
  n_pcs = 6,
  start_cluster = "C-TAL-1",
  cluster_label = "cluster"
)

tal_setup$elbow_plot

tal_plot <- plot_slingshot_trajectory(
  sce_sl = sce_tal_sl,
  var_explained = tal_setup$var_explained,
  title = "TAL Slingshot trajectory"
)

tal_plot$plot

pb90_TAL2$pseudotime <- slingPseudotime(sce_tal_sl)[, 1]

tal_cols <- c(
  "aTAL"    = "red3",
  "C-TAL-1" = "darkgreen",
  "C-TAL-2" = "dodgerblue3",
  "dTAL"    = "purple4"
)

plot_labels <- colData(sce_tal_sl)$cluster

plot(
  reducedDims(sce_tal_sl)$PCA[, 1:2],
  col = tal_cols[as.character(plot_labels)],
  pch = 16,
  cex = 0.4,
  asp = 1,
  xlab = paste0("PC1 (", round(tal_setup$var_explained[1], 1), "%)"),
  ylab = paste0("PC2 (", round(tal_setup$var_explained[2], 1), "%)")
)

lines(
  SlingshotDataSet(sce_tal_sl),
  lwd = 4,
  col = "black"
)

legend(
  "topright",
  legend = names(tal_cols),
  col = tal_cols,
  pch = 16,
  bty = "n"
)
```

```{r}
FeaturePlot(pb90_TAL2, features = "pseudotime", reduction = "umap.TRIAD")
VlnPlot(pb90_TAL2, features = "pseudotime", group.by = "group", pt.size = 0)
```

```{r}
FeaturePlot(
  pb90_TAL2,
  features = c(
    "UMOD",
    "SLC12A1",
    "KCNJ1",
    "CLDN16"
  ),
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD"
)
```

```{r}
FeaturePlot(
  pb90_TAL2,
  features = c(
    "VCAM1",
    "LCN2",
    "KRT8",
    "KRT18",
    "VIM"
  ),
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD"
)
```

```{r}
slingLineages(sce_tal_sl)
```
```{r}
tal <- slingPseudotime(sce_tal_sl)

pb90_TAL2$TAL_lineage1<- tal[, 1]
pb90_TAL2$TAL_lineage2 <- tal[, 2]
```

```{r}
FeaturePlot(
  pb90_TAL2,
  features = c("TAL_lineage1", "TAL_lineage2"),
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD"
)
```
```{r}
plot_df <- FetchData(
  pb90_TAL2,
  vars = c("TAL_lineage2", "group")
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(TAL_lineage2))

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = group, y = TAL_lineage2)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.12, outlier.shape = NA) +
  labs(
    x = "Group",
    y = "TAL lineage 2 pseudotime",
    title = "TAL lineage 2 pseudotime by group"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

plot_df1 <- FetchData(
  pb90_TAL2,
  vars = c("TAL_lineage1", "group")
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(TAL_lineage1))

ggplot(plot_df1, aes(x = group, y = TAL_lineage1)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.12, outlier.shape = NA) +
  theme_classic()
```
```{r}
kruskal.test(TAL_lineage1 ~ group, data = pb90_TAL2@meta.data)
kruskal.test(TAL_lineage2 ~ group, data = pb90_TAL2@meta.data)
```
```{r}
pairwise.wilcox.test(
  plot_df1$TAL_lineage1,
  plot_df1$group,
  p.adjust.method = "BH"
)

pairwise.wilcox.test(
  plot_df$TAL_lineage2,
  plot_df$group,
  p.adjust.method = "BH"
)
```
